{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315144950071F334F530C45E547"}"},"total":989},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7147675873561969440","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一些关于娱乐的小说，这本书吸引我的地方在于主角陈天问超正的三观。
不管是在全网黑他、抵制他的时候；还是他站在顶峰的时刻，他都云淡风轻。一种他说任他说，我自清风拂山岗的佛系流派。默默的做着公益，劝导青少年学生理性追星。这样一个不骄傲，不做作，专注于自身发展，尊重值得敬重的老前辈，也不欺负新人的主角，正是娱乐社会需要的正能量人物！
虽然结尾仓促，书中也有作者自己挖的坑，但我也看到了自己想看的内容。至于这本书存在的问题，也就不重要了。
希望作者下一本越写越好！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664198090,"group_id":"6984689577776647199","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3VDRdoaTZNohw8QQBw0otve5kBu8ax3UCbqnJFwQGGb","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a41bcaf435a6438baf5e15460439810a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796396&x-signature=Jcgsk53PBssj2SIN3TNL0ERrpYQ%3D","user_id":"2137044024041895","user_name":"喜欢你的小五哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2137044024041895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6984689577776647199","book_info":{"abstract":"陈天问重生九州国，得知自己身患肺癌，只能活不到一年的时间，但幸好他获得了一个名叫全能娱乐天王的系统，从此，他在娱乐圈的道路上越走越远，他踩着各种天王天后登顶娱乐圈之巅，当他彻底治好癌症的时候，他回过头看，他的身后竟空无一人，他就是这个时代的神！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6f5067f9e202074caab68ba0b0958029","author":"青山本尊","author_id":"","book_id":"6984689577776647199","book_name":"娱乐：我是全能天王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1909人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://new
